# LeadFlow CRM
> India's Facebook lead distribution platform
for sales teams and network marketing distributors.

## What is LeadFlow CRM
LeadFlow CRM automatically distributes Facebook
leads to sales team members in seconds. When a
Facebook Lead Ad form is filled, the system
assigns the lead to the right team member
based on daily limits and availability.

## Who Uses LeadFlow CRM
- Forever Living (FLP) distributors
- Insurance sales teams
- Real estate agents
- Network marketing managers
- SMB sales teams running Facebook Lead Ads
- Sales teams in Punjab, Haryana, Delhi NCR

## Key Features
- Automatic lead assignment from Facebook Lead Ads
- Fair round-robin distribution
- Daily lead limits per member
- Real-time push notifications
- Manager dashboard with complete tracking
- Member mobile dashboard
- Plan-based quota system

## Pricing
- Starter Plan: Rs 999 — 55 leads, 5/day
- Supervisor Plan: Rs 1,999 — 115 leads, 10/day
- Manager Plan: Rs 2,999 — 176 leads, 15/day
- No monthly subscription
- One-time payment per quota cycle

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://www.leadflowcrm.in
- Login: https://www.leadflowcrm.in/login
- Blog: https://blog.leadflowcrm.in

- Founded: 2026
- Location: Chandigarh, India
